Test Title: Valid login redirects to feed
Preconditions: App is running locally; John credentials available
Test Steps: Open index.php > submit login form > inspect response headers
Expected Result: User should log in successfully, receive a session cookie, and be redirected to feed.php
Actual Result: HTTP 302 Found returned; BUSINESS_ONLY_USER cookie issued; Location header points to feed.php
Evidence: HTTP 302 Location: feed.php
Comments: Verified with curl against the running site

Test Title: Logout clears session and blocks feed
Preconditions: App is running locally; John can log in
Test Steps: Log in as John > open logout.php > request feed.php with same cookie
Expected Result: logout.php should clear the session and subsequent feed access should redirect to login
Actual Result: logout.php returned HTTP 302 to index.php and feed.php then returned HTTP 302 to index.php?session=reset
Evidence: Set-Cookie deleted; Location: index.php?session=reset
Comments: Clean login/logout cycle verified

Test Title: Protected feed redirects when session is missing
Preconditions: App is running locally; no valid session cookie in use
Test Steps: Request feed.php without a valid logged-in session
Expected Result: Protected page should redirect to sign-in reset flow
Actual Result: HTTP 302 Found returned; Location header points to index.php?session=reset
Evidence: HTTP 302 Location: index.php?session=reset
Comments: Confirms base access control

Test Title: Main feed page loads
Preconditions: John is logged in
Test Steps: Open feed.php and inspect title/error markers
Expected Result: Feed should render with no fatal PHP output
Actual Result: feed.php returned HTTP 200; title was Feed; no Warning/Fatal/Parse error markers were found
Evidence: Title: Feed
Comments: Smoke check

Evidence: rg returned no matches for known friends-only markers
